evals.prompt: Design a feature flag strategy for a new checkout flow. We want to roll it out safely to 10% of users first, then 50%, then 100%.
evals.expected_output: Feature flag rollout plan and strategy.
expectations: Defines the targeting strategy (e.g., user ID hashing for consistent assignment)
Includes monitoring and rollback criteria for each phase
Mandates a cleanup phase to remove the flag after 100% rollout

evals.prompt: We are using LaunchDarkly. Write a policy for feature flag lifecycle management so our codebase doesn't become a mess of old flags.
expectations: Categorizes flags (e.g., Release, Experiment, Ops/Kill Switch)
Establishes a maximum lifespan for release flags (e.g., 2 weeks post-launch)
Describes the process for creating technical debt tickets to clean up stale flags
